disruptions.title: Red Sea / Bab-el-Mandeb — Houthi attacks
disruptions.description: Ongoing missile and drone attacks on commercial shipping. Many carriers rerouting around Cape of Good Hope, adding 10-14 days transit time and higher fuel cost.

disruptions.title: Panama Canal — draft & slot restrictions
disruptions.description: Water level in Gatun Lake affects transit slots and maximum draft. Larger vessels may face delays or need to lighten load.

disruptions.title: Ukraine airspace closed to civil aviation
disruptions.description: Full civil airspace closure. Overflight not permitted; cargo routed via Poland/Romania/Turkey.

disruptions.title: Russian/Belarusian airspace closed to EU/US carriers
disruptions.description: EU, UK, US, Canada carriers banned from Russian airspace and vice versa. Trans-Siberian route unavailable to affected carriers — long detours via Middle East / Alaska.
